hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -n "$FILE" ] && npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -n "$FILE" ] && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -n "$FILE" ] && { [ -f biome.json ] && npx @biomejs/biome format --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || [ -f .prettierrc ] && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || [ -f dprint.json ] && dprint fmt "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; } || true

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -n "$FILE" ] && { TEST_FILE=$(echo "$FILE" | sed 's/\.[^.]*$/.test&/'); [ -f "$TEST_FILE" ] && npx vitest run "$TEST_FILE" --reporter=verbose 2>/dev/null || true; } || true

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(\.env|dist/|node_modules/)' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Protected path. Use a different location."}}' || true

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$CMD" | grep -qEi '(rm -rf /|git push.*--force|DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|mkfs|dd if=)' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked: this command is potentially destructive."}}' || true

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git commit'; then MSG=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -oP '(?<=-m ["'\''"'\'''])[^"'\''"'\''']+''); if [ -n "$MSG" ] && ! echo "$MSG" | grep -qE '^(feat|fix|refactor|docs|chore|test|style|perf|ci|build|revert)(\(.+\))?(!)?:'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Commit message must follow conventional commits: feat:, fix:, refactor:, docs:, chore:, test:, etc."}}'; fi; fi
BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); CHANGES=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | head -10); [ -n "$BRANCH" ] && echo "Current branch: $BRANCH. Changed files: ${CHANGES:-none}" || true
